title: PatchouliButton-Backport
description: PatchouliButton 1.18.x backport. This mod is an addon for the mod Patchouli which adds all patchouli books into one.
body:
# PatchouliButton-Backport
PatchouliButton-Backport is PatchouliButton 1.18.x backport version.

This mod is a minecraft mod addon for the mod [Patchouli](https://modrinth.com/mod/patchouli) which adds a button to visit all patchouli books. (Fabric 1.18.x)

The book can get accessed through the inventory ui.

### License
PatchouliButton is licensed under MIT.
